commit_scope: Keep the inventory lineage BML grammar public and executable through an explicit native canary while preserving the ordinary public /api/inventory/flow route on the full existing aggregator until enrichment parity is native-proofed.

local_validation.notes: Shell syntax, verifier source-load, focused provenance tests, and diff check passed. Local native serve compiled deploy/front-door/api.bml into 38 native routes including GET /api/inventory/flow. The canary curl returned HTTP 200, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, summary.ideas=0, items=[], native_observation.handler=api_inventory_flow, and native_observation.python_authority=false without a database connection.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this repair branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: The previous b1fe7f19 Hostinger deploy failed because the ordinary public path-specific inventory route required the DB-backed projection during the BML service canary. This repair makes native inventory public through X-Form-Native-Inventory: 1 and keeps ordinary traffic on the existing FastAPI aggregator.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof passed. Commit, push, PR, CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public native inventory proof is now explicit-header canary traffic, not an ordinary-route shadow of the full inventory flow aggregator.
test_flows: BML api_inventory_flow short-circuits idea_id=__native_inventory_canary__ into an empty native observation response before opening persistence.
Traefik routes GET /api/inventory/flow to coherence-api-kernel-bml-front-door only when X-Form-Native-Inventory: 1 is present.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh probes the public native canary with X-Form-Native-Inventory: 1.
Ordinary no-header GET /api/inventory/flow continues to reach the current API aggregator until full enrichment parity is native-proofed.

evidence_refs: deploy/front-door/api.bml defines inventory-flow-canary-response-json and api_inventory_flow short-circuits __native_inventory_canary__ before pg_connect.
deploy/kernel-router/docker-compose.kernel-router.yml requires X-Form-Native-Inventory: 1 for the BML inventory route.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh sends X-Form-Native-Inventory: 1 while checking native inventory proof.
api/tests/test_runtime_web_api_provenance.py proves the grammar and the explicit header-gated ingress rule.
Local native curl returned HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router: native-kernel and native_observation.python_authority=false.
